1000642978.english: They are coming from different directions. The number of Iron Bug following behind is... enormous.
1000642978.korean: 각각 다른 방향에서 오고 있소. 뒤따라 오는 철충의 개체수도... 어마어마하군.

1000642981.english: Just as I barely managed to defeat the Iron Bug I saw for the first time, identical individuals appeared from different directions.
1000642981.korean: - 처음 보는 철충을 간신히 쓰러뜨리자 똑같은 개체들이 각기 다른 방향에서 나타났다.

1000642982.english: An ominous sense emanated from beyond the screen. As a red light flashed where the eyes should have been, an indescribable anxiety washed over me.
1000642982.korean: - 화면 너머에서부터 불길함이 전해져 왔다. 눈이 있어야 할 부위에서 붉은 빛이 번뜩이자, 형용할 수 없는 불안감이 찾아왔다.

1000642983.english: Starting with the appearance of a new Iron Bug, Iron Bug signals flooded the screen. They appeared faster and in greater numbers than when the pillar of light was discovered.
1000642983.korean: - 새로운 철충의 등장을 시작으로 화면에 철충 신호가 폭주했다. 빛기둥이 발견됐을 때보다도 더 빠르게, 더 많이 나타났다.

1000642984.english: As long as Dragon's Fleet is nearby, the number of ordinary Iron Bugs is meaningless. It is only a matter of time; the main force will not be defeated.
1000642984.korean: - 용의 함대가 근처에 있는 이상, 평범한 철충들의 숫자는 무의미하다. 시간이 문제일뿐, 본대는 당하지 않겠지.

1000642985.english: However... the isolated members are not like that.

1000642986.english: On the side of the branch, a pillar of light rose up that was thicker and brighter than before.
1000642986.korean: - 지부 쪽에는, 아까보다 더 굵고 밝아진 빛기둥이 솟아올라 있었다.

1000642988.english: ...No matter how much I cut, there is no end to it. Just how much further do I have to go...
1000642988.korean: ...베어도 베어도 끝이 없군요. 도대체 얼마나 더 가야...

1000642989.english: We're almost out of ammunition, too.

1000642990.english: Death is drawing near to me...

1000642991.english: Are you going to keep saying such unlucky things?!

1000642992.english: Don't be ridiculous, I'm going to make it back alive!
1000642992.korean: 웃기지 마, 나는 살아서 돌아갈 거야!

1000642997.english: It seems to be getting worse... No way.
1000642997.korean: 점점 더 안좋아지는 것 같은... 설마.

1000642998.english: Were you... constantly interfering with Babel's control?!
1000642998.korean: 계속해서... 바벨의 제어권에 간섭하고 있었던 건가요?!

1000642999.english: I have to... *cough*, stop my sister...

1000643000.english: I think you said you only assisted with control. Is that possible?
1000643000.korean: 너는 제어의 보조만 맡았다고 했던 것 같은데. 그게 가능한가?

1000643001.english: Of course not! That is why... this painful...

1000643004.english: You must retreat. If we go any further...

1000643005.english: Ashes to ashes, dust to dust...

1000643008.english: Those who defy the light and embrace chaos...
1000643008.korean: 빛의 위명을 거스르고 혼돈에 몸을 던진 자들이여...

1000643009.english: May the light bring peace to the wandering spirits searching for a glimmer of light in the darkness...
1000643009.korean: 어둠 속에서 한줄기 빛을 찾아 떠도는 망령들에게 빛의 안식을...

1000643010.english: Oh Light, have mercy on them.

1000643012.english: With this kind of power, surely...

1000643013.english: First of all... I can finally breathe a sigh of relief.

1000643017.english: Ramiel-nim, you're being bothered because of us...

1000643018.english: I was born only for hardship and atonement.
1000643018.korean: 저는 고행과 속죄만을 위해 태어난 몸.

1000643020.english: Ah, may the blessing of light be with you.

1000643021.english: Ramiel, it's really nice to see you. And thank you.

1000643023.english: You're visitors from outside, aren't you?

1000643024.english: I'm sorry I got you involved in something like this... I'm ashamed to face the light.
1000643024.korean: 이런 일에 휩쓸리게 해버려서... 빛께 면목이 없습니다.

1000643025.english: No, it was a really big help.

1000643026.english: And I wasn't swept away. Because I've decided to help you of my own free will.
1000643026.korean: 그리고 휩쓸린 게 아니에요. 저의 의지로 여러분을 돕기로 했으니까요.

1000643027.english: Ah... What a clear and unwavering faith...

1000643028.english: Ramiel-nim, are you trying to shoulder everything alone again...?
1000643028.korean: 라미엘님, 또 전부 혼자서 짊어지시려는 건가요...?

1000643029.english: ... Azazel's corruption is also a sin I must bear.

1000643030.english: As I mentioned... Leave it all to me.

1000643035.english: Not only during the "Iron Punishment," but also until eternal sleep and mutual destruction... I couldn't protect anything, or anyone.
1000643035.korean: "철의 징벌"때는 물론, 영원한 잠과 상잔까지... 아무것도, 누구도 지키지 못했어요.

1000643036.english: And I... Now, asking for help from others is...
1000643036.korean: 그런 제가... 이제 와서 다른 분들에게 도움을 청할 수는...

1000643037.english: It's noisy. Has the burden from the countless ages of holy fire eased a bit?
1000643037.korean: 시끄럽군. 억겁의 성화로 인한 부담은 좀 가셨나?

1000643039.english: You are definitely a sinner, Ramiel.

1000643040.english: From the past to the present, and even into the future. All the sins are yours to bear.
1000643040.korean: 과거와 현재, 그리고 미래까지. 모든 죄는 네가 짊어질 몫이지.

1000643041.english: But this case is different. The Savior's safety is threatened.
1000643041.korean: 하지만 이 건은 다르다. 구원자의 안위가 위협받고 있다.

1000643043.english: Yes. Not the Apostle of Light you're talking about, sister... You are the true savior who has descended into this world.
1000643043.korean: 네. 언니가 말하는 빛의 사도가 아니라... 현세에 강림한 진짜 구원자님이세요.

1000643045.english: In the pitch-black darkness, you finally bring a ray of light...
1000643045.korean: 칠흑같은 어둠 속에서, 마침내 한 줄기 광명을 내려주시는군요...

1000643046.english: If you understand, you know exactly how to behave.

1000643047.english: The creatures of light should rightly praise the savior who has finally descended.
1000643047.korean: "마침내 강림한 구원자를 빛의 피조물들은 마땅히 찬양해야할 것이라."

1000643048.english: ... Sinner Ramiel, I will follow the will of the light.

1000643051.english: I don't understand what you're saying.

1000643052.english: They finally acknowledged the savior, didn't they?

1000643053.english: Don't be mistaken. As a judge, I only corrected the faith of the confused believers.
1000643053.korean: 착각하지 마라. 심판관으로서 혼란에 빠진 신도의 신앙을 바로잡았을 뿐이다.

1000643059.english: Me too... Because I'm a sinner.

1000643061.english: As I mentioned before, I will never give up.
1000643061.korean: 전에 말씀드렸던 것처럼, 저는 절대 포기하지 않을 거예요.

1000643062.english: If I give up... That's not allowed, is it?

1000643064.english: Have you ever seen an Iron Bug like that?

1000643065.english: This is my first time seeing the subordinate office.

1000643066.english: To think an Iron Bug that travels alone instead of in a pack...
1000643066.korean: 무리를 짓지 않고 홀로 다니는 철충이라니...

1000643067.english: I have a bad feeling about this. Can you handle it before they get close?
1000643067.korean: 불길한 예감이 들어. 접근하기 전에 처리할 수 있겠나?

1000643068.english: I guess I can give it a try.

1000643069.english: Withdraw your troops. I will bombard you immediately.

1000643070.english: Support fire is coming. The units in the rear must form a formation and retreat cautiously.
1000643070.korean: 지원포격이 온다. 후열의 부대부터 대형을 갖춰 신중히 퇴각하라.

1000643071.english: While the rear ranks retreat, the units in the front ranks-

1000643072.english: ...Something is amiss. All units, retreat immediately!
1000643072.korean: ...무언가 심상치 않군. 전 부대, 즉시 퇴각해라!

1000643076.english: No matter how many times I look at it, the firepower is tremendous.

1000643077.english: Normally, I would have thought that was excessive firepower, but...

1000643079.english: Did I really manage to hold out...!

1000643080.english: To think you survived after being hit by concentrated fire...!

1000643084.english: Huh? It's the older sisters. Older sisters!

1000643085.english: What are you up to, sisters? You know... Mom and Dad have been sleeping in late lately, so—
1000643085.korean: 언니들, 뭐해? 있잖아. 요즘 엄마랑 아빠가 늦잠을 자서-

1000643091.english: Cookies for the sisters who are finding strength because of salvation...

1000643092.english: Sister, your face is pure white... Are you sure you're okay?
1000643092.korean: 언니, 얼굴이 새하얘... 괜찮은 거 맞아?

1000643093.korean: 아자젤 언니 괜찮은 거 맞지, 엔젤 언니?

1000643095.english: Angel, the little angel is worried.

1000643096.english: Please tell me not to worry.

1000643100.english: The Light got angry because of that filthy thing and inflicted iron punishment! It's divine retribution!
1000643100.korean: 빛이 저 더러운 것 때문에 화가 나셔서 철의 징벌을 내린 거야! 천벌이라고!

1000643101.english: Give me back my daughter and son!

1000643102.english: If it weren't for you, we wouldn't be in this mess!
1000643102.korean: 네가 아니었다면 우리가 이런 꼴을 당할 일도 없었을 텐데!

1000643104.english: It's all because of me... I will atone...

1000643105.english: I feel so sorry for Ramiel... She hasn't done anything wrong, but people keep throwing stones at her... and getting angry...
1000643105.korean: 라미엘 언니가 불쌍해... 아무 죄도 없는데 사람들은 자꾸 라미엘 언니한테 막 돌 던지고... 화내고...

1000643106.english: They say everything bad is Ramiel's fault. Why are they acting like that? Why do they say I shouldn't get close to Ramiel? Is Ramiel really the bad one?
1000643106.korean: 나쁜 건 전부 라미엘 언니 탓이라 그래. 왜 그러는 거야? 왜 라미엘 언니에게 가까이 다가가면 안 된다고 그래? 정말 라미엘 언니가 나쁜 거야?

1000643108.english: Ramiel is someone who endures hardship for the sake of everyone.

1000643109.english: Just as everyone has their own role, Ramiel is simply being faithful to his own role.
1000643109.korean: 각자의 역할이 있듯이 라미엘도 자신의 역할에 충실한 것뿐이에요.

1000643110.english: Just as I... have to save everyone...

1000643112.english: Hehe, actually, listening to you, I’ve been listening to my parents, not being picky about food, and praying hard for you.
1000643112.korean: 헤헷, 안 그래도 언니 말 듣고 나 부모님 말씀 잘 듣구, 편식하지 않구, 빛께 열심히 기도하고 있어.

1000643113.english: You can be saved soon, right, unnie?
1000643113.korean: 곧 구원받을 수 있는 거 맞지, 언니?

1000643120.english: ...As you angels know, the members of the branch are falling into an eternal dream one by one.
1000643120.korean: ...천사님들도 아시다시피 지부 사람이 하나 둘씩 영원한 꿈에 빠지고 있습니다.

1000643121.english: If it is the will of the Light... there is no way it would take them away.
1000643121.korean: 빛의 뜻이라면... 그들을 거두어갈 리가 없죠.

1000643122.english: That can't be true, it shouldn't be.
1000643122.korean: 그럴 리가 없습니다, 그래선 안 됩니다.

1000643123.english: I... I don't have much time left...
1000643123.korean: 제가 얼마나... 앞으로 얼마 남지 않았는데...

1000643125.english: Branch Manager, we have already trained longer than usual.

1000643126.english: I can't take it anymore... Please, let's stop here for today...
1000643126.korean: 더는 힘들어요... 제발, 오늘은 여기서 그만둬주세요...

1000643127.english: The day to unite everyone's hearts is not far off!
1000643127.korean: 모두의 마음을 하나로 모으는 날이 얼마 남지 않았습니다!

1000643130.english: Why! Why don't you know? Do you not realize how important this matter is?!
1000643130.korean: 왜! 왜 모르시는 겁니까? 이번 일이 얼마나 중요한지 모르고 계시는 겁니까?!

1000643131.english: The Kagoshima Branch is the only remaining saint of light in the world, the last hope!
1000643131.korean: 가고시마 지부는 세상에 남은 유일한 빛의 성도, 마지막 희망입니다!

1000643132.english: Do you think it is a normal occurrence for the believers there to lose their lives in an eternal dream?
1000643132.korean: 그곳의 신도들이 영원한 꿈으로 목숨을 잃는 게 예삿일이라고 생각하십니까?

1000643133.english: We are the beings closest to the light.

1000643134.english: Absolutely, absolutely... it cannot end like this. Roll up your sleeves, Lord Azazel.
1000643134.korean: 절대로, 절대로... 이렇게 끝날 순 없습니다. 소매를 거두십시오, 아자젤님.

1000643135.english: I understand, Branch Manager. I get it.

1000643139.english: I'm sorry, it seems I got impatient.

1000643140.english: I need to handle the barbell as soon as possible... Why am I still... Right...
1000643140.korean: 한시라도 빨리, 빨리 바벨을 다뤄야 하는데... 어째서 아직도... 그래...

1000643141.english: Could it be that there wasn't enough medicine?

1000643143.english: Haha! I can't believe I didn't realize something this simple!
1000643143.korean: 하하! 이런 단순한 걸 깨닫지 못했다니!

1000643144.english: If you administer just a little, just a little more, you will be able to handle it quickly. Right, Azazel?
1000643144.korean: 조금만, 조금만 더 투여하면 금방 다루실 수 있을 겁니다. 그렇죠, 아자젤님?

1000643146.english: She is already taking dozens of times the amount of medicine she was given at the beginning, and lately, she even coughs up blood every time she coughs!
1000643146.korean: 벌써 처음에 맞았던 약의 수십 배를 맞고 있어요, 언니는 요즘 기침할 때마다 피까지 토하신단 말이에요!

1000643147.english: Are you really saying this is the will of the Light, Branch Manager?! How can the Light... force the sacrifice of one person...
1000643147.korean: 이게 정녕 빛의 뜻이란 말씀이세요, 지부장님?! 어떻게 빛이... 한 사람의 희생을 강요하냔 말이에요...

1000643148.english: How dare... the will of the light...!

1000643151.english: As expected of Lord Azazel. So you intend to save everyone.

1000643152.english: Yes, Branch Manager. I will give you my two arms.
1000643152.korean: 네, 지부장님. 제 두 팔을 드릴게요.

1000643154.english: Because the Light sent me down to save the world.
1000643154.korean: 빛께서, 세상을 구원하기 위해 저를 내려보내셨으니까.

1000643158.english: You have to stop now. You're going to collapse at this rate.
1000643158.korean: 이제 그만하셔야 돼요. 이러다 언니 쓰러져요.

1000643159.english: It is a big problem that the believers are falling into an eternal dream, but if my sister returns to the embrace of the light first like this...
1000643159.korean: 신도분들이 영원한 꿈에 빠져드는 것도 큰일이지만, 이러다 언니가 먼저 빛의 품으로 돌아가버리면...

1000643160.english: Please, I beg of you, sis...

1000643161.korean: 날 두고 가지 마요, 제발... 흑...

1000643163.english: It’s okay. I’ll be able to handle Babel perfectly in just a little while. For the sake of Angel, Ramiel, and the little angel, too.
1000643163.korean: 괜찮아요. 조금만 더 있으면 바벨을 완벽히 다룰 수 있을 거니까. 엔젤과, 라미엘과 꼬마 천사님을 위해서라도요.

1000643164.english: Just a little further. Just a little more.

1000643165.english: The world, cough! It might be saved...
1000643165.korean: 세상은, 콜록! 구원받을 수 있을 거예요...

1000643168.english: The cookies today are really delicious.

1000643177.english: Why can't you handle the barbell yet, why!
1000643177.korean: 왜 아직도 바벨을 다루지 못하는 겁니까, 왜!

1000643178.english: Don't you understand the meaning of light? I've told you so many times that the only way to save this chaotic world is for everyone to become one!
1000643178.korean: 빛의 뜻을 모르시겠습니까? 이 혼란한 세계를 구원할 수 있는 유일한 방법은, 모두가 하나가 되는 것뿐이라고 내가 몇 번이나 얘기했잖아!

1000643179.english: We must be saved, that is the only way...!

1000643183.english: We will stop training here for today.

1000643184.english: The medicine... I will administer double the dose from yesterday. Time is running out now.
1000643184.korean: 약은... 어제보다 2배로 투여하죠. 이제 시간이 촉박합니다.

1000643186.english: Then your body won't be able to handle it, no!
1000643186.korean: 그럼 언니의 몸이 못 버텨요, 안돼요!

1000643187.english: Then you need to be able to handle the barbell quickly!
1000643187.korean: 그럼 빨리 바벨을 다룰 수 있어야 할 거 아냐!

1000643191.english: You guys think you're safe, right?

1000643192.english: Are you at ease just because only humans are dying? Huh?!

1000643193.english: It is us, not you, who fully understand the light. We—no, I—the world...!
1000643193.korean: 빛을 온전히 이해하는 건 너네가 아니라 우리야. 우리가, 아니 내가 세상을...!

1000643196.english: I'll take it. I'll take the medicine...

1000643206.english: It had already been 6 hours since he fainted...

1000643210.english: If it were a different Azazel instead of me.

1000643211.english: If that person has superior abilities compared to me.
1000643211.korean: 그 사람이 저보다 뛰어난 능력을 가졌다면.

1000643212.english: Would the priests have been spared from the fear of death every time they conducted an experiment?
1000643212.korean: 실험할 때마다 사제님들이 죽음의 공포에 떨지 않아도 됐을까요?

1000643213.english: Wouldn't he have already saved people by perfectly handling Babel?
1000643213.korean: 이미 바벨을 완벽히 다뤄서 사람들을 구원하지 않았을까요?

1000643215.english: Why would someone like me be called by the light...
1000643215.korean: 왜 나같은 게 빛의 부름을 받아서...

1000643216.english: I wish I hadn't been born.

1000643218.english: It is our mission to save everyone. We must not have evil thoughts...!
1000643218.korean: 모두를 구원하는 게 우리 사명이잖아요. 나쁜 마음을 먹으면 안 돼요...!

1000643221.english: I guess I'm a really bad person.

1000643223.english: I don't see the little angel today.

1000643225.english: Sister, you've already turned your back on the little angel for a whole month. Do you know that she burst into tears every time?
1000643225.korean: 언니, 벌써 한달동안이나 꼬마 천사님을 외면하셨어요. 그 때마다 울음을 터트렸던 거 아세요?

1000643226.english: Now, let's talk to the little angel...

1000643228.english: I promised salvation to the little angel, yet I still can't handle Babel. How am I supposed to look at the little angel with such a face?
1000643228.korean: 꼬마 천사님한테 구원을 약속한 주제에, 아직도 바벨을 다루지 못하는 제가 어떤 얼굴로 꼬마 천사님을 봐야되나요.

1000643229.english: Once you become able to handle the barbell, then...
1000643229.korean: 바벨을 다룰 수 있게 되면, 그러면...

1000643235.english: Mom and Dad... won't wake up. Help me, sisters...
1000643235.korean: 엄마랑 아빠가... 안 일어나. 도와줘, 언니들...

1000643238.english: Sisters, what am I supposed to do now...?

1000643239.english: You said the light would save us, right? Huh? That's right.
1000643239.korean: 빛이 우리를 구원해 주겠다고 했지? 응? 맞지?

1000643240.english: I... listened to my mom and dad, prayed hard, and didn't have a picky diet so I could go to school...
1000643240.korean: 나... 학교 가려고 엄마랑 아빠 말 잘 듣고, 기도도 열심히 하고, 편식도 안 했는데...

1000643241.english: Still not allowed...? Did I do something bad? Is that why Mom and Dad took the punishment instead?
1000643241.korean: 그래도 안돼...? 나 나쁜 짓한 거야? 그래서 엄마랑 아빠가 대신 벌 받은 거야?

1000643242.english: Am I really that bad of a child?

1000643245.english: Little Angel, you haven't done anything bad.
1000643245.korean: 꼬마 천사님은 나쁜 짓한 거 하나도 없어요.

1000643246.english: It's all my fault. If only I could have handled the barbell a little faster...
1000643246.korean: 다 제 잘못이에요. 제가 조금만 더 빨리 바벨을 다룰 수 있었으면...

1000643247.english: If only that had happened, this wouldn't have happened...!
1000643247.korean: 그랬으면 이런 일이 안 일어났을 텐데...!

1000643248.english: I'm sorry... I'm sorry, little angel...

1000643250.english: Please don't cry, both of you...

1000643254.english: Please save us, the little lambs who follow You...
1000643254.korean: 부디 당신을 따르는 우리, 어린 양들을 구원해주시옵소서...

1000643255.english: I don't care if I am not saved, but please, at least save them...
1000643255.korean: 저는 구원받지 못해도 좋으니 제발 그들만은 구원해주십시오...

1000643264.english: Sister, are you okay...? Wake up, sister...!

1000643267.english: Haha... I've bet everything... on these useless things... Heck!
1000643267.korean: 하하... 나의 모든 걸... 이딴 쓸모없는 것들에게 걸어서... 큭!

1000643272.english: If I'm going to die, at least everyone at the same time on the same day...
1000643272.korean: 내가 죽을 거라면, 최소한 모두 한날 한시에...

1000643274.english: Did you feel it too, unnie? The Branch Manager's emotions...!

1000643275.english: No way... you wouldn't really... people...!

1000643277.english: I have to get up... I have to get up quickly! Ugh... Aaaah!
1000643277.korean: 일어나야 하는데... 빨리 일어나야 하는데! 윽... 아아악!

1000643278.english: My head... my head hurts like it's going to explode...!

1000643280.english: What? Sister, what do you mean by voice...

1000643284.english: The entire branch is on fire...!

1000643286.english: No, I have to stop it...!

1000643287.english: If only I could unite everyone's hearts, and handle Babel...!
1000643287.korean: 모두의 마음을 하나로 모으면, 내가 바벨만 다룰 수 있으면...!

1000643289.english: Still the barbell... Why! Why can't I handle it yet...!
1000643289.korean: 아직도 바벨을... 왜! 왜 아직도 다룰 수 없는 거야...!

1000643290.english: Where is Ramiel?! If you were here, you surely would have stopped it...!
1000643290.korean: 라미엘님은 어디 계시죠?! 계셨다면 분명히 막으셨을 텐데...!

1000643291.english: ...Ramiel is currently fighting Iron Bugs outside.

1000643292.english: All the security turrets blocking the Iron Bug stopped... so the Branch Manager probably... Ah.
1000643292.korean: 철충을 막던 경비 터렛이 전부 멈춰서... 아마 지부장님이... 앗.

1000643293.english: Fire where the little angel lives...!

1000643297.english: Angel, please stop the bleeding from the little angel's belly quickly.
1000643297.korean: 엔젤, 빨리 꼬마 천사님의 배를 지혈해주세요.

1000643298.english: Uh, angel sisters... I was baking cookies... it worked out well...
1000643298.korean: 어, 천사 언니들... 쿠키 굽고 있었는데... 잘 됐...

1000643299.english: You must not close your eyes. Can you hear my voice? You absolutely, never must fall asleep!
1000643299.korean: 눈 감으면 안 돼요, 제 목소리 들려요? 반드시, 절대로 잠들면 안돼요!

1000643301.english: Did I do something bad...? Is that why Light is punishing me...?
1000643301.korean: 나, 나쁜 짓 한 거야...? 그래서 빛님이 나한테 벌주는 거야...?

1000643305.english: It hurts... I should have prayed harder during worship...
1000643305.korean: 아파... 예배시간에 기도 열심히 할 걸...

1000643306.english: It's okay, because I'll survive. Because I can live, I... even if I have to sacrifice everything...!
1000643306.korean: 괜찮아요, 살아날 거니까. 살 수 있으니까, 내가... 모든 걸 바쳐서라도...!

1000643308.english: I have to go to school...

1000643309.english: I don't think I'll be able to get up...

1000643310.english: My emotions are gradually... Why is this happening...

1000643312.english: Keep your eyes wide open; you must not close them.
1000643312.korean: 두 눈 똑바로 뜨세요, 절대 감으면 안 돼요.

1000643313.english: Hehe... I already closed my eyes, unnie... But... my eyes feel so heavy...
1000643313.korean: 헤헤... 이미 감아버렸어, 언니... 그치만... 눈이 너무 무거운 걸...

1000643314.english: Mom and Dad... will I be able to see them...

1000643326.english: Even if it's a consecrated host that has received the grace of light... I've reached my limit. Go back and rest with Angel.
1000643326.korean: 아무리 빛의 성은을 받은 성체라도... 이제 한계에요. 어서 돌아가서 엔젤과 같이 쉬세요.

1000643328.english: I received the medicine you sent me before. Thanks to you, I feel much better.
1000643328.korean: 전에 보내주신 약, 잘 받았어요. 덕분에 몸이 편안해졌어요.

1000643329.english: But it was only for a week.

1000643331.english: Let me give you a fun question. How much medicine have I been administered so far?
1000643331.korean: 재미있는 문제 하나 낼게요. 제가 지금까지 투여받은 약은 얼마나 될까요?

1000643332.english: Swallowing, applying, injecting... medicine absorbed through every possible method to achieve an effect.
1000643332.korean: 삼키고, 바르고, 주사하고... 효과를 볼 수 있는 모든 방법으로 흡수한 약이요.

1000643333.english: This tower, the very medicine needed to handle the barbell...!
1000643333.korean: 이 탑, 바벨을 다루기 위한 바로 그 약...!

1000643335.english: Azazel... you would better go back immediately. All the suffering you are currently enduring is a trial sent by the Light—
1000643335.korean: 아자젤... 어서 돌아가는 게 좋겠어요. 지금 겪는 모든 고통은 빛께서 내린 시련-

1000643336.english: Don't say things like that in front of me!

1000643339.english: Don't ever say things like that in front of me again.
1000643339.korean: 두 번 다시, 내 앞에서 그딴 얘기하지 마.

1000643340.english: ...Oh, right. I found something interesting. Would you like to take a look?
1000643340.korean: ...아, 맞다. 재밌는 걸 발견했는데, 같이 볼래요?

1000643341.english: Look at this! These things lying on the floor.

1000643342.english: Let's see, this looks like the most fun.

1000643343.english: Babel is a large-scale photon device designed for various functions.
1000643343.korean: [바벨은 다양한 기능으로 사용할 수 있도록 설계된 대규모 광자 장치다.]

1000643344.english: [To handle this, we need a bioroid with telepathic abilities. Therefore, we decided to modify the Azazel and Angel models using the genes of the "First Angel" born right here at the Kagoshima Branch.]
1000643344.korean: [이것을 다루기 위해선 정신감응 능력을 가진 바이오로이드가 필요하다. 그래서 우리는 바로 이곳, 가고시마 지부에서 태어난 "첫 번째 천사"의 유전자를 이용해 아자젤과 엔젤 모델을 개조하기로 했다.]

1000643345.english: [Azazel handles the Babel, and Angel plays the role of amplifying and assisting Azazel's power. Theoretically, it is perfect.]
1000643345.korean: [아자젤은 바벨을 다루고, 엔젤은 아자젤의 힘을 증폭 및 보조하는 역할. 이론상으로는 완벽하다.]

1000643346.english: [If there is a slight problem, it is that in exchange for telepathic abilities, the mental constraints that a bioroid should naturally possess have been significantly weakened.]
1000643346.korean: [약간의 문제가 있다면, 정신감응 능력의 댓가로 바이오로이드라면 응당 가져야할 정신적 제약이 몹시 약해졌다는 점이다.]

1000643347.english: [Of course, in reality, there won't be much difference. After all, faith is the most perfect shackle.]
1000643347.korean: [물론, 실질적으로는 별다른 차이는 없을 것이다. 신앙이야말로 가장 완벽한 족쇄니까.]

1000643349.english: Hehe, you're saying the fun part hasn't even started yet?
1000643349.korean: 후후, 아직 재미있는 부분은 시작도 안했다구요?

1000643350.english: [In addition to Babel's original function, it is also expected to have the effect of rallying believers seeking to escape the "iron punishment." Naturally, offerings must be received from them. Salvation is not free.]
1000643350.korean: [바벨의 원래 기능 외에도, "철의 징벌"을 피하려는 신도들을 결집하는 효과도 기대된다. 당연히 그들에게는 헌금을 받아야겠지. 구원은 공짜가 아니다.]

1000643351.english: [If the project succeeds, we can use Azazel and Babel to instill suitable values ​​into the gathered believers.]
1000643351.korean: [프로젝트가 성공한다면, 아자젤과 바벨을 이용해 모인 신도들에게 적합한 가치관을 주입할 수 있다.]

1000643352.english: [A paradise on earth and a theocratic state that will usher in a new era is being born.]
1000643352.korean: [지상의 낙원이자, 새로운 시대를 열어갈 제정일치 국가가 탄생하는거다.]

1000643356.english: I knew all of that! From the very beginning...!
1000643356.korean: 그런 거, 전부 알고 있었다구요! 처음부터...!

1000643358.english: Their hearts were filled not with faith, salvation, or belief, but with nothing but dark desire and vanity.
1000643358.korean: 그들의 마음 속엔 믿음과 구원, 신앙이 아니라 시커먼 욕망과 허영심만이 가득했거든요.

1000643360.english: Even those who chase only desires in a world half-ruined...
1000643360.korean: 반쯤 망해버린 세상에서도 욕망만을 좇는 그들도...

1000643361.english: Even I, who tried hard to pretend not to know because I was afraid of being denied myself.
1000643361.korean: 저 스스로가 부정당할까봐 무서워서 애써 모른척했던 저도.

1000643363.english: This, too... must all have been the Light's will, right?

1000643364.english: It must all be trials inflicted upon me, right? That painful medicine, and the taking of the baby angel too!
1000643364.korean: 전부 제게 내려진 시련이겠죠? 그 고통스러운 약도, 아기 천사님을 앗아간 것도요!

1000643369.english: Isn't it about time you answered...?
1000643369.korean: 이제 대답해 주실 때도 되지 않았나요...?

1000643370.english: I overcame all the trials you gave me, too.

1000643371.english: Through Babel, they are uniting the hearts of the remaining believers and living steadfastly.
1000643371.korean: 바벨을 통해서 남은 신도들의 마음을 하나로 모으고, 꿋꿋하게 살아가고 있다고요.

1000643372.english: Waiting only for your answer! For decades...!
1000643372.korean: 당신의 대답만을 기다리면서! 수십 년 동안...!

1000643373.english: The fact that you made humans bring us into birth, subjected us to trials, and took the life of a little angel...
1000643373.korean: 당신이 인간들로 하여금 우리들을 태어나게 만들고, 시련에 들게 하여 꼬마 천사의 목숨을 앗아간 게...

1000643374.english: It has already been decades since I naively offered prayers, believing that there is a purpose of light in all of it!
1000643374.korean: 그 모든 것에 빛의 뜻이 있을 거라고 생각하는 제가 순진하게 기도를 올린 게 벌써 수십 년째라구요!

1000643375.english: Are you that amused by the fact that I love humans, suffer at the hands of humans, and fall into despair after losing them...!
1000643375.korean: 제가 인간을 사랑하고, 인간에게 고통받고, 인간을 잃어 절망에 빠진 게 그렇게 즐거우신가요...!

1000643377.english: Why are you doing this to me...? Why!

1000643385.english: Azazel. I swear by the light, please tell me only the truth...
1000643385.korean: 아자젤. 빛에 맹세코 진실만을 얘기해 주세요...

1000643386.english: No way... Have you forsaken the light?

1000643387.english: That's a bit too much of a joke, Ramiel.

1000643388.english: Abandon the light? I still serve and revere the light.
1000643388.korean: 빛을 저버리다뇨. 저는 여전히 빛을 섬기고 받들고 있어요.

1000643390.korean: 언니...?! 도대체 무슨 일이 있었던 거예요?

1000643391.english: And what are those murals and symbols, again...?
1000643391.korean: 저 벽화와 상징들은 또 뭐구요, 네...?

1000643393.english: This is... He's the apostle who will save us.

1000643395.english: Like the humans swept away by the "Iron Punishment," the Apostle of Light will save us.
1000643395.korean: "철의 징벌"에 쓸려나간 인간들처럼, 빛의 사도가 저희를 구원해줄거예요.

1000643396.english: Without any pain or suffering... It will let you return to the embrace of the light.
1000643396.korean: 아무런 고통도, 번뇌도 없는... 빛의 품으로 돌아가게 해주겠죠.

1000643397.english: So, you don't have to defeat the Apostle of Light anymore. While quietly offering a prayer... Wait for the light to shine thru.
1000643397.korean: 그러니 더 이상 빛의 사도는 쓰러뜨리지 않아도 괜찮아요. 조용히 기도를 올리면서... 빛내림을 기다리세요.

1000643399.english: Azazel, who faithfully followed the light and guided us... I couldn't keep it...
1000643399.korean: 신실하게 빛을 따르고 저희를 이끌어주던 아자젤을... 지키지 못했어요...

1000643400.english: Sister, what on earth are you talking about? Snap out of it!
1000643400.korean: 언니, 그게 대체 무슨 소리에요! 정신차려요!

1000643402.english: Humanity is a breeding ground for disaster. And it's already as good as extinct.
1000643402.korean: 인류는 재앙의 모판이에요. 그리고 이미 멸종한 거나 마찬가지구요.

1000643403.english: Rather... Don't you feel sorry for us? Born according to human will, serving them, and dying without purpose...
1000643403.korean: 오히려... 우리가 불쌍하지 않나요? 인간의 뜻대로 태어나, 그들을 섬기고 아무 목적 없이 죽어가는 것...

1000643404.english: I'd rather seek the help of the Apostle of Light and return to the embrace of the light. That's what salvation is.
1000643404.korean: 차라리 빛의 사도의 도움을 받아 빛의 품으로 돌아가죠. 그게 바로 구원이에요.

1000643405.english: Alright, Angel. Ramiel. Please hold my hand. Everyone can be saved.
1000643405.korean: 자, 엔젤. 라미엘. 제 손을 잡으세요. 모두 구원받을 수 있어요.

1000643407.english: If she were the sister I know, she would never say something like that...!
1000643407.korean: 내가 아는 언니라면 절대 그런 말을 하지 않아...!

1000643408.english: What happened, sis? So that's how it ended up like this, right?
1000643408.korean: 무슨 일이 있으셨던 거죠, 언니? 그래서 이렇게 된 거죠?

1000643409.english: Please tell me, I will definitely help you!

1000643412.english: They are not at fault... It's all my fault for not being able to stop that chaos on that day...
1000643412.korean: 이들은 잘못이 없습니다... 모든 것은 그 날, 그 소란을 막지 못한 저의 죄입니다...

1000643414.english: ..." Until the "light descends," I will bear their sins in their stead.

1000643415.english: I will atone until they return to your side...
1000643415.korean: 이들이 당신 곁으로 돌아올 때까지 속죄하겠나이다...

1000643416.english: Even on the day they carry out their "Light Descent" and still refuse to repent, continuing to tarnish the reputation of the Light...
1000643416.korean: 이들이 결행할 "빛내림" 날에도 개심하지 않고, 여전히 빛의 위명을 먹칠한다면...

1000643417.english: I am Ramiel... Even if my humble body is torn to pieces and cannot return to the light...!
1000643417.korean: 저, 라미엘... 비천한 몸이 조각조각나 빛께 돌아가지 못한다 해도...!

1000643418.english: I will definitely take on their sins and become a martyr along with the Tower of False Light...
1000643418.korean: 반드시, 이들의 죄를 떠맡고 거짓된 빛의 탑과 함께 순교하겠습니다...

1000643423.english: Everyone, the regimental commander and the officers are still...

1000643424.english: Okay, let him rest a little.

1000643425.english: I know very well how hard it was. But more than that...
1000643425.korean: 얼마나 힘들었는지는 나도 잘 아니까. 그보다...

1000643426.english: You finished the race to the end.

1000643428.english: You have to be able to do at least this much...

1000643429.english: I liked it. Do you want to apply to be a non-commissioned officer?

1000643433.english: You fell really awkwardly. It's obvious.

1000643438.english: The hell training planned for today ends here.

1000643439.english: I could have trained your minds and bodies more thoroughly if I had the chance. It’s a shame.
1000643439.korean: 원래라면 좀 더 치밀하게 제군들의 심신을 단련시킬 수 있었을 텐데, 아쉽군.

1000643440.english: As expected, the swimsuit contest will be for later...

1000643443.english: I get what you want, but stop observing with an infrared sight.
1000643443.korean: 마음은 알겠는데 적외선 조준경으로 관측하는 건 관둬.

1000643444.english: The drone performs evasive maneuvers because it thinks it is an enemy.

1000643445.english: Corporal Silky, where are the cosmetics? It's urgent. I need to apply them quickly.
1000643445.korean: 실키 상병님, 화장품 어디 있슴까? 급함다. 빨리 칠해야 함다.

1000643446.english: Brownie, do you know how to put on makeup?

1000643447.english: I learned a lot while dressing up Miss Neodim!
1000643447.korean: 네오딤 양을 꾸며주면서 많이 배웠지 말임다!

1000643448.english: I may not know your skills, Commander, but I don't get criticized anywhere. Please leave it to me!
1000643448.korean: 연대장님의 실력은 잘 몰라도 저도 어디서 타박받진 않슴다. 저한테 맡겨주십쇼!

1000643450.english: It seems like Corporal Leprechaun is gradually treating Brownie like a daughter.
1000643450.korean: 레프리콘 상병은 점점 브라우니를 딸처럼 대하는 거 같아요.

1000643451.english: It can't be helped... He's my immediate senior...

1000643455.english: Aiming at this aircraft is dangerous. Please refrain from doing so.
1000643455.korean: 본 기체를 조준하는 행위는 위험합니다. 지양하십시오.

1000643456.english: I am sorry, Mr. Drone. My subordinates have been rude because of me.
1000643456.korean: 죄송합니다, 드론님. 부하들이 저 때문에 무례를 끼쳤습니다.

1000643457.english: I will be careful to ensure this does not happen again.

1000643459.english: Recipient confirmed, C-77 Red Hood. Is that correct?

1000643461.english: Caller ID. Boryeon, Audrey. Is that correct?

1000643463.english: Recipient and sender verified. Item delivery complete.
1000643463.korean: 수신인 및 발신인 확인. 물품 전달 완료.

1000643464.english: Is there anything else you need?

1000643467.english: PES is your friend. Don't forget the 24-hour call service!
1000643467.korean: “PECS 사는 시민 여러분의 친구입니다. 24시간 콜 서비스를 잊지 마세요!”

1000643468.english: Is there a swimsuit inside this?

1000643469.english: Try it on right away! It will definitely suit you.

1000643470.english: With the battalion commander's looks, winning the swimsuit contest is a sure thing!
1000643470.korean: 연대장님 외모면 수영복 콘테스트 우승도 따논 당상임다!

1000643471.english: Brownie, what are you doing to the Battalion Commander...!

1000643474.english: What officer wouldn't be pleased by a soldier's sincere encouragement? In fact, it's good to feel the sincerity.
1000643474.korean: 병사의 진심 어린 격려에 기뻐하지 않을 간부가 어딨나. 오히려 진심이 느껴져서 좋군.

1000643477.english: Regimental Commander, would it be alright if I finished my makeup after changing clothes?
1000643477.korean: 연대장님. 메이크업은 옷을 갈아입고 난 후에 마무리하면 되겠습니까?

1000643478.english: Alright, I'll leave it to you. I can get ready by myself, but since there is no mirror, I need your help.
1000643478.korean: 그래, 부탁하지. 혼자 준비할 수 있는데 거울이 없으니 도움을 받아야 하는군.

1000643479.english: No, is it meaningful in that it is done together with the soldiers?
1000643479.korean: 아니, 장병들과 함께 한다는 점에서 의미가 깊은가.

1000643481.english: Don't you need something to cover up?

1000643482.english: It’s fine since there’s no one around except you guys.
1000643482.korean: 주변에 제군들 말고 아무도 없으니 괜찮다.

1000643483.english: To be able to change clothes outside while being escorted by comrades is quite a luxury.
1000643483.korean: 전우의 호위를 받으며 바깥에서 갈아입을 수 있다니, 호사로군.

1000643484.english: That's right! The Battalion Commander has an amazing physique, too.

1000643485.english: Even His Excellency the Commander will be completely captivated when he sees it!

1000643488.english: ...It's nothing. Then I'll finish wearing it.

1000643489.english: This is the first time I've seen a design with frills.

1000643490.english: I wonder if it will suit me...

1000643492.english: We have to fit in... Right, Corporal Silky...?

1000643494.english: You will look even prettier if you add priest accessories as well.
1000643494.korean: 사제 악세서리도 추가하면 더욱 예뻐지실 거예요.

1000643495.english: Thank you, gentlemen. How much good fortune must I have had in my past life...
1000643495.korean: 고맙다, 제군들. 나란 녀석은 전생에 얼마나 많은 복을...

1000643496.english: That's right, Your Excellency the Commander likes cute things, too.
1000643496.korean: 맞슴다, 사령관 각하도 귀여운 거 좋아하시지 말임다.

1000643497.english: If the Battalion Commander shows up in a swimsuit, you'll definitely be blown away!
1000643497.korean: 분명히 연대장님이 수영복을 입고 나타나면 뿅 가실검다!

1000643499.english: ...Commander, are you alright? Your hand has been stopping for a while now.
1000643499.korean: ...연대장님, 괜찮으십니까? 아까부터 자꾸 손이 멈추고 계십니다.

1000643501.english: Did I, did I do something wrong again?

1000643502.english: ...No. It was due to the soldier's pure encouragement....

1000643504.english: The Regimental Commander isn't a young girl, so surely she wouldn't be so easily startled by a single word from His Excellency saying she likes him!
1000643504.korean: 연대장님이 소녀도 아니고 설마, 각하가 좋아한다는 말 한마디에 깜짝깜짝 놀라시겠슴까!

1000643506.english: We are the invincible Steel Line. We are a military unit that must trust and follow the Commander before viewing him as a romantic interest.
1000643506.korean: 우리는 무적의 스틸라인임다, 사령관 각하를 연애대상으로 보기 전에 믿고 따라야 하는 군부대임다.

1000643507.english: Furthermore, surely someone as great as the Regimental Commander leading the unit wouldn't do such a thing!
1000643507.korean: 하물며 부대를 이끄는 연대장님 같이 대단하신 분이 설마 그러시겠슴까!

1000643511.english: I will be keeping watch in the southern direction. Checking the magazine for rounds up to the right, no abnormalities found. Firearm function check is problem-free.
1000643511.korean: 남쪽 방향은 제가 사주경계하겠습니다. 현재 탄창 우상탄 확인, 이상무, 총기 기능검사 문제없습니다.

1000643512.english: We report that the spare magazines, scopes, and various equipment have also been confirmed to be in perfect condition.
1000643512.korean: 예비 탄창과 조준경, 각종 장구류도 이상 없음이 확인돼 보고드립니다.

1000643513.english: Excellent. To think the effects of the mental training are already showing.

1000643515.english: It's the first time I've seen the Battalion Commander giving a lecture, too, but I can't believe Brownie went that far...
1000643515.korean: 연대장님이 교육하는 건 나도 처음봤는데, 브라우니가 저렇게까지...

1000643517.english: What are you so moved by...

1000643518.english: In order to understand Captain Mari a little more and to follow her example.
1000643518.korean: 마리 대장님을 조금이라도 더 이해하고 본받기 위해서.

1000643519.english: Above all, to repay your efforts, I will definitely win the contest.
1000643519.korean: 무엇보다 제군들의 노력에 보답하기 위해서, 반드시 콘테스트에서 우승하겠다.

1000643520.english: You are excellent. We Brownies will also make a special effort to assist you, Commander.
1000643520.korean: 훌륭하십니다. 연대장님을 보조할 수 있도록 저희 브라우니들도 각별히 노력을 기울이겠습니다.

1000643524.english: Huh? It seems like the surroundings have gotten brighter.

1000643525.english: Regimental Commander, I am reporting an unusual situation!

1000643526.english: A light is rising nearby, and many Iron Bugs are being detected in the vicinity.
1000643526.korean: 가까운 곳에 빛이 솟아오르면서 주변에 철충이 다수 감지되고 있습니다.

1000643527.english: This is a place where the territory has already been secured, so why...?

1000643528.english: The situation is urgent, so there is no time to change clothes.
1000643528.korean: 상황이 긴박하니 옷을 갈아입을 여유가 없군.

1000643529.english: Complete your preparations for battle. Are you ready, gentlemen?

1000643530.english: We observe the bushes shaking in front of us. They appear to be enemies, so please raise your weapons, everyone.
1000643530.korean: 눈앞에 수풀의 흔들림이 관측됩니다. 적으로 예상되니, 모두들 무기를 들어주십시오.

1000643531.english: I can't get used to this...!

1000643532.english: Where did this enemy come from? That was a close call!
1000643532.korean: 어디서 나타난 적임까? 큰일 날 뻔했지 말임다!

1000643533.english: It was really dangerous; it suddenly popped out right in front of my eyes...
1000643533.korean: 진짜 위험했슴다, 갑자기 눈앞에 툭 튀어나와선...

1000643535.english: It only lasts for as long as the training time.

1000643536.english: Is it based on a similar principle to winding a clock?

1000643537.english: I should make sure to properly observe the regimental commander's morale training next time.
1000643537.korean: 다음에 연대장님이 정신교육할 때 제대로 참관해야겠어요.

1000643538.english: Keep it as a textbook, too...

1000643539.english: Sergeant Impet, who is the injured?

1000643540.english: There are no wounded among the soldiers. However, the regimental commander standing in the line...
1000643540.korean: 병사들 중 부상자는 전무합니다. 다만 전열에 선 연대장님이...

1000643541.english: It was just a slight graze, so don't worry.

1000643542.english: Have you finished reporting to the Commander?

1000643543.english: I haven't reported it yet; I will contact you immediately.

1000643545.english: When Captain Mari isn't around, it's only right for me, the next in command, to report directly. I'll do it.
1000643545.korean: 마리 대장님이 없을 땐 차상급자인 내가 직접 보고하는 게 옳지. 내가 하마.

1000643546.english: Regimental Commander? But your current attire...

1000643547.english: Victory! Your Excellency's Red Shield, Commander Red Hood of the Steel Line reports.
1000643547.korean: 승리! 각하의 붉은 방패, 스틸라인의 부대장 레드후드가 보고드립니다.

1000643548.english: Red Hood, who called via video call, was wearing a pink swimsuit.
1000643548.korean: - 영상통화를 걸어온 레드후드는 핑크색 수영복을 입고 있었다.

1000643549.english: He was dressed in fancy clothes, but he had a serious expression, so I realized that Red Hood had just finished a battle.
1000643549.korean: - 팬시한 옷차림이었지만 진지한 표정을 짓고 있어서 레드후드가 막 전투를 끝냈단 걸 눈치챘다.

1000643550.english: An anomaly was found at current coordinates 31.569431, 130.772278.

1000643551.english: I report that a massive pillar of light has appeared not far away.
1000643551.korean: 멀지 않은 곳에 거대한 빛의 기둥이 나타났다고 보고 드립니다.

1000643552.english: We have been marching from the port where the Orca is anchored to here. Is everything alright with the main force?
1000643552.korean: 오르카 호가 정박한 항구에서 이곳까지 행군하고 있었습니다. 본대엔 별일 없습니까?

1000643553.english: The location Red Hood contacted was far from the main force on the map, but very close to the branch.
1000643553.korean: - 레드후드가 연락한 위치는 지도 상 본대와 거리가 있는 대신에 지부와 무척 가까웠다.

1000643554.english: They could join the main force if they used their own firepower, but I judged this to be an opportunity.
1000643554.korean: - 본인들의 화력을 이용하면 본대와 합류할 수 있겠지만, 나는 이게 기회라고 판단했다.

1000643557.english: There is a defector Kohei sect in the Kagoshima branch, and 6 people have entered it.
1000643557.korean: 가고시마 지부에 변절한 코헤이 교단이 존재하고, 그곳에 들어간 인원이 6명.

1000643558.english: Rescuing them and stopping the pillar of light at the same time.
1000643558.korean: 그들을 구출해내는 것과 동시에 빛의 기둥을 정지시키는 것.

1000643559.english: May I understand that this is the mission the Commander has assigned to Steel Line?
1000643559.korean: 그것이 사령관 각하가 스틸라인에 내린 임무라고 숙지해도 되겠습니까?

1000643560.english: It was also explained that the main force could not provide support, but Red Hood remained unfazed.
1000643560.korean: - 본대가 지원할 수 없다는 것도 설명했는데, 레드후드는 동요하지 않았다.

1000643561.english: He was the very embodiment of a true soldier, acting as if completing the mission was his duty, so why on earth was he in a swimsuit... Was it during a break after hell training?
1000643561.korean: - 임무를 해내는 게 자신의 사명이라는 것처럼 참된 군인 그 자체였는데, 대체 왜 수영복 차림을... 지옥훈련이 끝나고 휴식시간이었나.

1000643562.english: It is a crisis situation. I ignored the minor sense of unease.

1000643563.english: I have one question, Your Excellency the Commander.
1000643563.korean: 한 가지 묻고 싶은 게 있습니다, 사령관 각하.

1000643565.english: The roles of us and the members in the branch are crucial.
1000643565.korean: 저희와 지부에 있는 대원들의 역할이 막중하군요.

1000643566.english: Understood. The Steel Line unit will certainly complete the mission for the Orca and Your Excellency.
1000643566.korean: 알겠습니다. 스틸라인 부대는 오르카 호와 각하를 위해서 반드시 임무를 완수해내겠습니다.

1000643572.english: It's, it's okay. It seems the commander also approved.
1000643572.korean: 괘, 괜찮습니다. 사령관 각하도 좋게 봐주신 것 같습니다.

1000643573.english: This is as good as winning.

1000643575.english: Because the commander is not someone who says "it suits you" to just anyone.
1000643575.korean: 사령관님은 어울린다는 말을 아무에게나 하지 않는 분이시니까요.

1000643577.english: I boasted loudly to Captain Marie and the Commander that I would straighten out the unit's discipline with hellish training.
1000643577.korean: 지옥훈련으로 부대의 기강을 바로 잡겠다고 마리 대장님과 사령관 각하께 큰소리를 떵떵 쳤다.

1000643578.english: The efforts you all have put in from morning until afternoon, all for just one person...
1000643578.korean: 아침부터 오후까지 제군들이 해온 노력이 고작 나 하나 때문에...

1000643579.english: Hmph, reporting to the Governor-General that I'm enjoying my vacation more than anyone else.
1000643579.korean: 후후, 누구보다 바캉스를 만끽하는 꼴로 각하께 보고하다니.

1000643580.english: The regimental commander has disgraced the honor of Steel Line.

1000643582.english: A pistol...! Stop it, Sergeant Silky!

1000643583.english: Grab the pistol first, no need to hang it on your belt!
1000643583.korean: 권총부터 잡아, 허리에 매달릴 필요 없어!

1000643587.english: Just me... I can't stop it...!

1000643591.english: Hey, you know what it feels like to fly?
1000643591.korean: 저기 있잖아, 하늘을 나는 건 어떤 기분이야?

1000643592.english: Well, there's nothing particularly special about it.

1000643593.english: It's just getting some more sea breeze. Right, Undine?
1000643593.korean: 그냥 바닷바람이나 더 쐬는 정도야. 그렇지, 운디네?

1000643596.english: Huh? Undine, why are you sighing in broad daylight?

1000643597.english: They say sighing makes good luck run away. Smile like Neri, like this.
1000643597.korean: 한숨 쉬면 복 달아난대. 네리처럼 웃어, 이렇게.

1000643600.english: Tethys, Undine looks down. I wonder what's wrong?
1000643600.korean: 테티스, 운디네가 기운 없어보여. 무슨 일일까?

1000643601.english: Ah, did you gain weight again because of the cheesecake? The Commander doesn't really care about things like that.
1000643601.korean: 아, 혹시 치즈케익 때문에 또 살 찐 거야? 사령관은 그런 거 별로 신경 안 써.

1000643605.english: Hahaha, I can tell just by looking why.
1000643605.korean: 꺄하핫, 딱 봐도 뭐 때문인지 알겠는데?

1000643606.english: How long has Undine been stationed here?

1000643607.english: What are you trying to say now..!

1000643608.english: Has it been almost a year?

1000643609.english: It might have been a little longer. Why?
1000643609.korean: 조금 더 됐을 수도 있겠다, 그게 왜?

1000643610.english: Since the Invincible Dragon joined, we've been focusing on outside activities.
1000643610.korean: 무적의 용님이 합류하면서 우린 외부활동에 치중하고 있잖아.

1000643611.english: Since I have fewer opportunities to join the main Orca fleet, naturally, I also... with the Commander...
1000643611.korean: 오르카 호 본대랑 합류할 일이 적어졌으니까, 당연히 사령관이랑도...

1000643612.english: No... No! It's not like that!

1000643614.english: I missed you... It's just because of that!
1000643614.korean: 보고 싶어져서... 단지 그것 때문에 그래!

1000643617.english: That’s a line from 'How to Unconditionally Captivate Men!', right? Undine, you’ve studied a lot.
1000643617.korean: 무조건 남성을 사로잡는 방법!'에 나온 대사 맞지? 운디네, 공부 많이 했구나.

1000643618.english: If Neri studies that, will she be able to get closer to the Commander? How should she study?
1000643618.korean: 네리도 그거 공부하면 사령관이랑 더 친해질 수 있을까? 어떻게 공부해야 돼?

1000643619.english: It's not a line, it's the truth...!

1000643620.english: That's enough! I feel like I'm going to become just like you guys if I keep talking to you.
1000643620.korean: 됐어! 너희들이랑 이야기하다가 똑같아질 거 같아.

1000643622.english: Hahaha, did you see Undine's face turn red?
1000643622.korean: 꺄하핫, 운디네 얼굴 빨개진 거 봤어?

1000643623.english: It’s seriously so rewarding to tease you. Ugh, this is why I can't stand teasing. It’s so sweet...!
1000643623.korean: 정말 놀리는 보람이 넘친다니까. 으으, 이래서 놀리는 걸 못 참겠어. 너무 감미로워...!

1000643624.english: Huh? Why? Why are you teasing me?
1000643624.korean: 응? 왜? 그게 왜 놀리는 거야?

1000643626.english: It's true that Undine likes the Commander. That's why she's shy.
1000643626.korean: 운디네가 사령관을 좋아하는 건 진짜잖아. 그러니까 수줍어하는 거고.

1000643628.english: Doesn't Tethys like the Commander too?

1000643630.english: That's great. How about joining the main force for summer vacation and hanging out with the commander?
1000643630.korean: 잘 됐다, 이번 여름휴가에 본대랑 합류하면 사령관과 다 함께 노는 건 어때?

1000643631.english: Undine, Tethys, Neri, the Vice-Captain, and even the Captain—everyone!
1000643631.korean: 운디네랑 테티스랑 네리랑 부함장님이랑 대장님까지, 전부!

1000643632.english: It's going to be really fun, Neri, I'm looking forward to it!

1000643633.english: ...They say you can't beat a fool.

1000643634.english: Why? Do you hate the commander?

1000643636.english: I, I'm going to go scout with Undine too.
1000643636.korean: 나, 나도 운디네랑 같이 정찰하고 올 거야.

1000643637.english: Maybe it's because the sun is stinging, but all the kids' faces are red.
1000643637.korean: 햇살이 따가워서 그런가, 애들 얼굴이 전부 빨갛네.

1000643638.english: I'm jealous. I want to fly in the sky too.

1000643640.english: You must be really busy on maritime patrol, so at least get a drink... Huh? Where is everyone...
1000643640.korean: 해상 경계하느라 많이 바쁘실 텐데 음료수라도 하나씩... 어? 다들 어디에...

1000643642.english: Tethys and Undine went on aerial reconnaissance. Without even resting! Isn't that amazing?
1000643642.korean: 테티스랑 운디네는 항공 정찰하러 갔어. 쉬지도 않고! 대단하지?

1000643644.english: To think that they finished scouting 30 minutes ago and went to scout again.
1000643644.korean: 30분 전에 정찰을 마치고 또 정찰하러 갔다니.

1000643645.english: I should convey Horizon's efforts to the Commander. He will surely be pleased to know how hard we are working.
1000643645.korean: 저희 호라이즌의 노력을 사령관님에게 전해드려야겠어요. 이렇게 노력하는 줄 알면 분명 기뻐하실 거예요.

1000643646.english: Right, I feel like it's been a long time since I've seen the Commander, too.
1000643646.korean: 맞아, 나도 사령관이랑 못 본지 오래 된 것 같아.

1000643647.english: It feels like just yesterday we were playing around together.
1000643647.korean: 같이 장난치고 놀던 때가 바로 어제 같은데.

1000643648.english: Now that the invincible Dragon has arrived, we must prove our strategic value as well.
1000643648.korean: 무적의 용님도 오셨으니 저희도 전략적인 가치를 입증해야죠.

1000643649.english: It is inevitable that we, who can freely roam seas free of Iron Bug, keep an eye on global trends.
1000643649.korean: 철충이 없는 바다를 자유롭게 누빌 수 있는 저희가 세계 동향을 살피는 건 어쩔 수 없어요.

1000643650.english: Vice Commander, don't you want to see the Commander?

1000643652.english: I miss Neri. I want to meet her and laugh and chat while telling her everything that happened at sea and everything we went through together, one by one!
1000643652.korean: 네리는 보고 싶어. 만나서 바다에서 어떤 일이 있었는지, 다 같이 어떤 일을 겪었는지 하나하나 얘기하면서 웃고 떠들고 싶어!

1000643655.english: I have so much I want to tell you, Commander.
1000643655.korean: 사령관님께 해주고 싶은 이야기가 너무 많아요.

1000643656.english: I will formally suggest a vacation when the Captain arrives, Nereid. Don't worry.
1000643656.korean: 대장님이 오시면 정식으로 휴가를 건의해볼게요, 네레이드. 걱정하지 마세요.

1000643657.english: Wow, really? We'll be able to set foot on land for the first time in a while.
1000643657.korean: 와, 정말? 우리도 간만에 육지를 밟아볼 수 있겠구나.

1000643659.english: What? What do you mean, a pillar?

1000643660.english: I've been on alert since morning, but something like that...

1000643662.english: Vice Commander, something unusual has been observed!

1000643663.english: Light in a place where there was nothing...!

1000643664.english: Seeing how the surrounding terrain is distorted, it looks like camouflage was used.
1000643664.korean: 주변의 지형지물이 일그러진 걸 보니 위장장치를 사용했나 봐요.

1000643665.english: There are no unusual occurrences at sea, but a large number of Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) have been observed on land and in the airspace!
1000643665.korean: 해상에 특이사항은 없지만, 육지랑 영공에 대규모의 철충이 관측됐어요!

1000643666.english: Even when I request communication from headquarters, they don't answer...!
1000643666.korean: 본대에 통신 요청을 해도 받지 않아...!

1000643667.english: Vice Commander, what should we do?

1000643669.english: We just need to go help the Commander together, Vice Commander?
1000643669.korean: 다 같이 사령관을 도우러 가면 돼, 부함장님?

1000643670.english: ...No, we are the only ones in charge of maritime surveillance until the Captain returns.
1000643670.korean: ...안 돼요, 함장님이 돌아오시기 전까지 해상경계를 담당하는 건 저희 뿐이에요.

1000643671.english: I will split the troops into two.

1000643672.english: Nereid and Tethys, please lead half of the fleet to the port to support the main force.
1000643672.korean: 네레이드랑 테티스는 함선 절반을 이끌고 항구로 가서 본대를 지원해주세요.

1000643673.english: Undine and I continue our maritime patrol.

1000643677.english: I finished preparing a while ago.

1000643678.english: Vice-Captain, Nereid and I will depart.

1000643680.english: ...I hope it wasn't the wrong choice.

1000643681.english: Vice-Captain, we have received a communication from Nereid and Tethys saying that the battle situation is critical.
1000643681.korean: 부함장님, 네레이드랑 테티스에게서 통신이 왔는데 전황이 급박하다고 해요.

1000643682.english: Furthermore, we couldn't reach the commander either...

1000643683.english: ...the enemy might attack from another place.

1000643684.english: Or I might have to go support that shining place.
1000643684.korean: 아니면 저 빛나는 곳에 지원을 가야 될 수도 있구요.

1000643685.english: Dividing it into two probably wasn't a wrong decision...
1000643685.korean: 둘로 나눈 게 틀린 결정은 아닐 텐데...

1000643686.english: What decision would the Captain have made...

1000643687.english: I would have made the same judgment.

1000643690.english: It is still a bit far from the main force, but not too far.
1000643690.korean: 아직까지 본대와 거리가 있는 편이나 멀진 않지.

1000643691.english: We are sailing at high speed, so please do not worry about us.

1000643692.english: Also, I was commended for the Horizon Unit's achievements while communicating with the Commander. Once this task is finished, we will surely receive an even greater reward.
1000643692.korean: 또, 사령관과 통신 중에 호라이즌 부대의 공로를 치하받았소. 이번 일만 끝나면 더욱 큰 보상을 받을 테지.

1000643696.english: It has perfectly filled the empty space of the main building.

1000643697.english: I have full authority over future command. Sirene, Vice-Captain, proceed immediately to the Pillar of Light on the opposite side of the port and support the Steel Line.
1000643697.korean: 앞으로의 지휘는 본관이 전권하지. 세이렌 부함장, 즉시 항구와 반대편에 있는 빛의 기둥으로 가서 스틸라인을 지원하시오.

1000643699.english: Please, save the main force... and the Commander...!

1000643701.english: My clan has never been defeated at sea.

1000643704.english: Accurate judgment and swift decision-making even in the absence of a superior.
1000643704.korean: 상급자가 없음에도 정확한 판단, 신속한 결단력.

1000643705.english: He was an exemplary model for soldiers appearing in the manual.
1000643705.korean: 교본에 등장하는 군인의 귀감으로서 모자람이 없었습니다.

1000643706.english: I don't have much of a family background, but I was born with good fortune in people.
1000643706.korean: 본관이 지닌 건 많지 않으나 인복은 타고 났지.

1000643707.english: Vice-Captain Sirene is too talented to be under someone else's command.
1000643707.korean: 세이렌 부함장은 누군가의 밑에 있기 아까운 인재.

1000643708.english: I do have plans to form a separate fleet, but for now, I must resolve the situation right in front of me.
1000643708.korean: 따로 함대를 편성할 계획도 갖고 있으나, 지금은 눈앞의 사태부터 해결해야겠군.

1000643709.english: And please feel free to speak. Aren't you and I, serving the Commander, just the same kind of commanders?
1000643709.korean: 그리고 편히 말하시길. 사령관을 섬기는 그대나 나나 똑같은 지휘관 아니겠소.

1000643710.english: Excuse me. It seems the command structure from the Black River days hasn't completely left my body yet.
1000643710.korean: 실례. 아직 블랙리버 때의 지휘 체계가 몸에서 덜 빠졌군.

1000643711.english: It's a continuation of what I said earlier... what do you think? Why don't you entrust the position of Vice-Captain to me?
1000643711.korean: 아까 한 말의 연장인데... 어떤가? 부함장을 내게 맡겨보지 않겠나.

1000643712.english: I will turn you into an outstanding talent not only in naval warfare but also in ground warfare.
1000643712.korean: 해상전은 물론, 지상전에서도 뛰어난 인재로 만들어주지.

1000643713.english: Haha, I heard there is an outstanding deputy commander under Captain Mari. What would you do if I made the exact same proposal?
1000643713.korean: 후후, 마리 대장 밑에 뛰어난 부대장이 있다고 들었소. 본관이 똑같은 제안을 하면 어떻게 하겠소?

1000643714.english: I see. It was a slip of the tongue.

1000643715.english: When you discover outstanding talent, you feel the urge to teach them what you know... It seems to be a chronic illness of commanders.
1000643715.korean: 뛰어난 인재를 발견하면 자신이 아는 걸 가르쳐주고 싶어지니... 지휘관들의 고질병이군.

1000643717.english: The proposal I made was by no means a joke, so please reconsider it.
1000643717.korean: 본관이 했던 제안도 결코 농이 아니니 재고해보시길.

1000643719.english: There is still a lot to teach the unit commander.
1000643719.korean: 부대장에겐 아직 가르칠 게 많이 남아있다.

1000643720.english: Didn't you say the other day that you had already caught up with Captain Mari in terms of troop operations?
1000643720.korean: 일전에 부대 운용 면에선 이미 마리 대장을 따라잡았다고 하지 않았소?

1000643721.english: It’s a headache that he’s sacrificing his own safety to boost morale. His subordinates can only feel at ease if he is safe himself...
1000643721.korean: 제 몸 버려가며 사기를 북돋아서 골치 아프군. 본인부터 안전해야 부하들도 안심하는 법인데...

1000643722.english: You look exactly like Captain Mari.

1000643723.english: I'm worried because you've inherited even the bad aspects.

1000643724.english: Anyway, it's a huge relief. I'm glad I joined the invincible Dragon Fleet as soon as I finished the infrastructure check.
1000643724.korean: 그나저나 천만다행이군. 인프라 점검을 끝내자마자 무적의 용 함대와 합류하길 잘했어.

1000643725.english: If it weren't for that, we wouldn't have been able to respond to this crisis in time.
1000643725.korean: 아니었으면 이번 위기에 제때 대처하지 못했을 테니.

1000643727.english: That's enough for the impressions, let's review the future operations. This vessel will commence support bombardment before entering the harbor.
1000643727.korean: 감상은 여기까지 하고 향후 작전을 검토하지. 본함은 항구에 정박하기 앞서 지원포격부터 개시할 것이오.

1000643728.english: The fleet led by Sirene's second-in-command is stationed near the Kohei Sect branch, and the main fleet will support the main force. Captain Marie, what will you do?
1000643728.korean: 세이렌 부함장이 이끄는 함대는 코헤이 교단 지부 쪽에 배치했고, 본 함대들은 본대를 지원할 예정이지. 마리 대장, 당신은 어떻게 할 것이오?

1000643729.english: I heard the Red Hood unit commander is at the branch, so I don't think we need to worry.
1000643729.korean: 지부에 레드후드 부대장이 가있다고 들었으니 걱정할 필요 없을 것 같군.

1000643730.english: I will reinforce the main force. After the support barrage, please anchor.
1000643730.korean: 본대에 전력을 보강하겠다. 지원 포격 후 정박을 부탁하지.

1000643731.english: Alright. I can see a harbor beyond the horizon.

1000643732.english: That's terrible. There are so many Metal Parasite Beasts!

1000643733.english: Although indiscriminate shelling should be avoided due to the unstable ground...
1000643733.korean: 지반이 견고하지 않아 무차별적인 포격은 지양해야겠으나...

1000643734.english: I've also received the unit deployment map from the commander, and our objective is the forest and ruins located some distance from the port. There are tons of fodder that can be dealt with right away.
1000643734.korean: 사령관에게 부대 배치도도 전달 받았고, 목표는 항구와 거리가 있는 숲과 폐허. 당장 처리해도 될 잡졸들이 천지군.

1000643735.english: We need to let our allies and our enemies know we've arrived.
1000643735.korean: 우리가 왔다는 걸 아군에게, 적들에게 알려야겠지.

1000643738.english: Do not let your guard down!

1000643739.english: We will break through at a single point. The enemies are nothing but henchmen.

1000643740.english: I will lead the way. Follow me!

1000643741.english: Uh, there are too many enemies!

1000643742.english: We've run out of bullets, Corporal Silky!

1000643744.english: Isn't Corporal Leprechaun running out of ammo?

1000643745.english: I, I've run out of magazines too.

1000643752.english: There aren't as many enemies as I expected.

1000643753.english: Are they all crowded at the destination, or are they heading toward the main force? Either way, it's the worst.
1000643753.korean: 목적지에 몰려있거나, 본대쪽으로 향한 건가. 어느 쪽이든 최악이다.

1000643754.english: No, since everyone is alive, isn't it the worst?

1000643757.english: However, the Battalion Commander has suffered heavy casualties. I saw a large wound on your left hand; are you alright?
1000643757.korean: 하지만 연대장님의 피해가 막심합니다. 왼손에 큰 상처를 입은 걸 봤는데 괜찮으십니까?

1000643761.english: The Regimental Commander took the hit from the Iron Bug that I was almost attacked by...!
1000643761.korean: 제가 철충에게 공격 당할 뻔한 걸 연대장님이 대신...!

1000643762.english: There is no need to blame yourself, soldier.

1000643763.english: All the soldier did was follow my command and fight bravely against the Iron Bug. Rather, he deserves to be praised for his merit. You worked hard.
1000643763.korean: 병사가 한 일은 내 지휘를 따라 철충과 용감히 싸운 것뿐. 오히려 공로를 치하 받아야 마땅하지. 고생했다.

1000643765.english: Are you saying there are no other injured, Sergeant Impet?
1000643765.korean: 다른 부상자는 없단 소리인가, 임펫 원사?

1000643766.english: No personnel were injured to the point of being unable to fight.
1000643766.korean: 전투가 불가능할 정도로 부상 당한 인원은 없습니다.

1000643767.english: The Regimental Commander's injury is the most serious in the entire unit.
1000643767.korean: 부대 전체를 통틀어도 연대장님의 부상이 가장 심각합니다.

1000643768.english: Even if a regimental commander is injured, it does not significantly change the unit's combat power. This is especially true for Steel Line.
1000643768.korean: 연대장 하나가 다쳐도 부대 전력에 큰 변화는 없다. 스틸라인이라면 더더욱.

1000643769.english: The firepower of the Steel Line comes from the soldiers. Take better care of them than a mere officer. Because in the current situation, they are more important than me.
1000643769.korean: 스틸라인의 화력은 병사에게서 나온다. 일개 장교보다 그들을 더 챙기도록. 현 상황에서는 이들이 나보다 더 중요하니까.

1000643770.english: And Sergeant Impet. You are the next in command after me here.
1000643770.korean: 그리고 임펫 원사. 이곳에서 나 다음가는 차상급자는 자네다.

1000643771.english: Even if I die in battle, complete the mission assigned by the commander.
1000643771.korean: 만일 내가 전사하더라도 사령관이 내린 임무를 완수하라.

1000643772.english: I will stand by your side to ensure that such a thing does not happen.

1000643773.english: Right. The branch office is up ahead, hmm...

1000643778.english: An energy shield spread out in a dome shape ahead is visible. Can you destroy it?
1000643778.korean: 전방에 돔 형태로 펼쳐진 에너지 장막이 확인된다. 파괴할 수 있겠나?

1000643780.english: I tried attacking the Iron Bug a few times during the battle, but it didn't budge.
1000643780.korean: 철충과 전투 중 몇 번 공격해봤는데 꿈쩍도 하지 않았습니다.

1000643782.english: I'll have to contact the main unit.

1000643784.english: Victory! Have you joined us, Captain Mari?

1000643786.english: The Steel Line main force has arrived at its current location upon discovering an unusual situation during its summer vacation and receiving orders from His Excellency.
1000643786.korean: 현재 스틸라인 본대, 여름휴가 중 특이사항 발견 및 각하의 명령을 받아 현 위치에 도착했습니다.

1000643787.english: I have been ordered to rescue personnel trapped at the Kagoshima branch and to shut down the tower, and I report that we are being blocked by an energy field requiring large-scale fire support during the operation.
1000643787.korean: 세부 지시사항으로는 가고시마 지부에 갇힌 인원 구출과 탑의 정지를 명 받았으며, 작전 중 대규모 화력 지원이 필요한 에너지장에 가로막혀 보고드립니다.

1000643788.english: The Siren副captain of the Horizon is heading there. Bombardment will begin as soon as the coordinates are transmitted, so get out of the area quickly.
1000643788.korean: 호라이즌 소속의 세이렌 부함장이 그곳에 향하는 중이다. 좌표만 전송하면 포격이 시작될 테니 그 자리에서 신속히 벗어나도록.

1000643790.english: I will brief the main force of the Orca on its situation while on the move.
1000643790.korean: 이동 중에 오르카 호 본대 상황을 브리핑하지.

1000643791.english: My elite troops and the invincible Dragon Fleet have joined the main force.
1000643791.korean: 현재 본대엔 나의 정예 부대와 무적의 용 함대가 합류했다.

1000643792.english: The war situation improved for a short while, but with the appearance of new Iron Bug, it is still in crisis.
1000643792.korean: 전황이 호전된 것도 잠시, 새로운 철충의 등장으로 여전히 위기지.

1000643793.english: As the swarming Iron Bug shows no signs of decreasing, everyone is accepting the current situation as a defensive battle rather than a battle of annihilation.
1000643793.korean: 몰려드는 철충이 좀체 줄질 않아 모두가 현 상황을 섬멸전이 아닌 방어전으로 받아들이고 있다.

1000643794.english: The fatigue of the combatants, who have been fighting for hours, has reached its extreme; it is a miracle they have held out this long.
1000643794.korean: 수시간 째 전투 중인 전투원들의 피로가 극한까지 쌓여, 지금까지 버티고 있는 게 용할 정도지.

1000643795.english: The roles of Regiment Commander Red Hood, the adjutant, and the main Steel Line are crucial.
1000643795.korean: 레드후드 연대장, 부관과 스틸라인 본대의 역할이 막중하다.

1000643797.english: Can I trust you with this?

1000643798.english: Even if it costs me my life, the mission with my unit members—

1000643799.english: Come back alive, all of you.

1000643800.english: I never want to experience losing an adjutant again.
1000643800.korean: 부관을 잃는 경험은 두 번 다시 하기 싫다.

1000643801.english: Come back and assist me by my side as usual. Understand?
1000643801.korean: 돌아와서 평소처럼 내 옆을 보좌하도록. 알겠나?

1000643803.english: You are assigning a difficult mission.

1000643804.english: If you are the adjutant of the Steel Line, you must accomplish any mission. Surely you aren't planning to say it's impossible?
1000643804.korean: 스틸라인의 부관이라면 어떤 임무라도 해내야 하지. 설마 불가능하다고 말할 작정인가?

1000643805.english: I am Red Hood. As the Vice-Captain of the Steel Line and Captain Marie's Adjutant, I will perfectly execute any mission.
1000643805.korean: 저 레드후드. 스틸라인의 부대장이자 마리 대장님의 부관으로서 어떤 임무라도 완벽히 수행해내겠습니다.

1000643806.english: Then, Captain Mari. I will see you again alive.
1000643806.korean: 그럼 마리 대장님. 살아서 다시 뵙겠습니다.

1000643807.english: Hmm. Support fire will begin soon.
1000643807.korean: 음. 곧 지원 포격이 시작될 거다.

1000643808.english: Prepare for loud noises, shocks, and Iron Bugs.

1000643810.english: That's much better. Thank you, Sergeant Silky.

1000643811.english: I was able to provide first aid, but...

1000643812.english: The wound is deep, so you need to get it treated properly. Until the colonel receives proper treatment, his left arm...
1000643812.korean: 상처가 깊어서 정식으로 치료받으셔야 해요. 제대로 된 처치를 받기 전까지 연대장님의 왼팔은...

1000643813.english: It's enough to move just one hand.

1000643814.english: Impet Sergeant. What about the injured?

1000643815.english: The power emergency treatment is complete.

1000643816.english: Colonel, if you allow it, I will take my place at the front lines from now on.
1000643816.korean: 연대장님, 허락하신다면 지금부터 제가 전열에 서겠습니다.

1000643817.english: Please take care of yourself in the rear.

1000643818.english: I understand your concern, but it's too early. It is not yet time for me to retreat from the battlefield.
1000643818.korean: 걱정하는 마음은 알겠으나 이르다. 나는 아직 전장에서 물러날 때가 아니다.

1000643819.english: But... That's a sturdy tent. Even with the Horizon's second-in-command personally firing, it still hasn't broken thru.
1000643819.korean: 그런데... 튼튼한 장막이군. 호라이즌 부함장이 직접 포격 중인데도 아직까지 깨지지 않았다니.

1000643820.english: It's just a matter of time anyway.

1000643821.english: Before we begin, Steel Line comrades.

1000643826.english: I, the regimental commander, am proud of you.

1000643827.english: Thank you, comrades, for following me this far, even tho you are exhausted from the rigorous training. But there's still work to be done.
1000643827.korean: 혹독한 훈련을 받아 지쳤음에도 여기까지 따라와준 제군들에게 고맙다. 하지만 해야 할 일이 남아있지.

1000643828.english: I promise you here and now.

1000643829.english: Once this mission is over, the Steel Line unit will have a week of vacation. I'll excuse you from guard duty as well as watch duty.
1000643829.korean: 이번 임무만 끝나고 나면 스틸라인 부대는 1주일간 휴가다. 불침번은 물론, 경계근무에서도 빼주마.

1000643830.english: I'll suggest it to the Commander and the General. It's a promise I'll keep, even if it costs me my life.
1000643830.korean: 내가 사령관 각하와 대장님께 건의하지. 내 목을 걸고서라도 반드시 지켜낼 약속이다.

1000643831.english: It's a special leave that no other unit has ever given, what do you think?
1000643831.korean: 그 어떤 부대에서도 받지 못한 특별 휴가인데, 어떤가?

1000643833.english: Additionally, there will be no sun drying or roll call.

1000643835.english: I will handle it as you instructed.

1000643838.english: This is a once-in-a-lifetime moment, a chance to become a hero.
1000643838.korean: 태어나서 한 번 있을까 말까한, 영웅이 될 수 있는 순간이다.

1000643839.english: Heroes, are you ready to become heroes?

1000643840.english: Battalion Commander! The barrier has been breached, will you enter immediately?

1000643841.english: That was faster than I thought. As expected, the Sirene's vice-captain. So, you're the second-in-command of Horizon.
1000643841.korean: 생각했던 것보다 빠르군. 역시 세이렌 부함장. 호라이즌의 부대장인가.

1000643842.english: How many shells are left, they said?

1000643843.english: They say they can't produce the same firepower now. It seems they used a lot of shells trying to break thru the tent.
1000643843.korean: 지금 같은 화력은 못 낸다고 합니다. 장막을 뚫느라 포탄을 많이 소모했나 봅니다.

1000643844.english: Then, request the remaining shelling in other areas.
1000643844.korean: 그러면 다른 지역에 나머지 포격을 요청하도록.

1000643845.english: If we can send even a few of the Metal Parasite to another place, it's a win.
1000643845.korean: 철충을 조금이라도 다른 곳에 보낼 수 있으면 이득이지.

1000643848.english: Colonel, surely not your leg too...!

1000643850.english: It's just a scrape that will heal with a little spit, so don't worry.
1000643850.korean: 침만 발라도 낫는 찰과상이니 걱정 마라.

1000643851.english: I swore to Captain Marie that I would return alive.

1000643852.english: As the second-in-command of Steel Line, it's a promise I absolutely must keep.
1000643852.korean: 스틸라인의 부대장으로서 절대로 지켜야 할 약속이지.

1000643855.english: Slow down a bit...! I'm running low on stamina...
1000643855.korean: 좀 천천히 가...! 나 체력 부족하단 말이야...

1000643856.english: In old movies, the slowest person is the first...
1000643856.korean: 옛날 영화에서 보면 발이 느린 사람이 제일 먼저...

1000643857.english: You're about to say something creepy again, aren't you? Stop it!
1000643857.korean: 너 또 오싹한 소리 하려고 그러지? 그만해!

1000643858.english: I guess it can't be helped. I'll handle it here.

1000643859.english: Sorry, could you help me up?

1000643860.english: By the way, what are you doing?

1000643862.english: I thought there would be enough parts, but there aren't enough, so I guess I can only make something for toddlers.
1000643862.korean: 부품이 충분할 줄 알았는데, 적어서 유아용밖에 못 만들겠네요.

1000643863.english: Oh, would you like me to add a button that makes a sound when pressed?
1000643863.korean: 아, 누르면 소리 나는 버튼도 달아 드릴까요?

1000643866.english: If there is a sound, enemies might swarm here.
1000643866.korean: 소리나면 적들이 이곳에 몰려들 수 있어요.

1000643867.english: Point out something else before that...!

1000643868.english: Okay! Let's go, I'm fully recovered.

1000643869.english: Oh my? Weren't you supposed to be unable to move even a single step?
1000643869.korean: 어머? 한발짝도 못 움직이는 거 아니었나요.

1000643870.english: I've almost finished making it, so please take it out of consideration.
1000643870.korean: 거의 다 만들었는데 성의를 봐서라도 타고 가시죠.

1000643871.english: It would be faster to carry it and run than to ride that!
1000643871.korean: 그걸 타고 가느니 들고 뛰는 게 더 빠르겠다!

1000643872.english: Damn it...! I'm going back and tell the human to hand over the tomato juice.
1000643872.korean: 씨이...! 돌아가서 인간한테 토마토 주스 내놔라고 할 거야.

1000643876.english: If that is the case, I will install a special engine here.
1000643876.korean: 정 그렇다면 여기에 특제 엔진을 달아드릴게요.

1000643877.english: You don't have to pedal. It goes at super high speed just by sitting down.
1000643877.korean: 페달을 밟지 않아도 돼요. 그냥 앉아있기만 해도 초고속으로 나간답니다.

1000643881.english: Unfortunately, I don't think it will fit Dracula or the sheep's body types.
1000643881.korean: 아쉽지만 드라큐리나 양 체형에 맞춰서 안될 것 같아요.

1000643882.english: It can't be helped. Since it has a wireless remote control function, I guess I should carry it around for now.
1000643882.korean: 하는 수 없죠. 무선 조종 기능을 달아뒀으니 일단은 가지고 다닐까요.

1000643883.english: Hehe, it's fine whenever you want to ride.

1000643887.english: ...Phew. Now this part is finished, too.

1000643888.english: The largest factory is the last one.

1000643889.english: Shall we go wrap things up?

1000643890.english: What? You already took care of that side? I heard Gloomy was almost out of ammo.
1000643890.korean: 뭐야, 벌써 그쪽 다 처리했어? 음침이 쟤, 탄약도 거의 다 떨어졌다며.

1000643891.english: We will replenish the ammunition soon. There is plenty of good metal here.
1000643891.korean: 탄약은 곧 보충해드릴 예정이에요. 여긴 좋은 금속이 많군요.

1000643892.english: No, you said it's not here right now...

1000643893.english: Shall we go to the next factory?

1000643894.english: Reload your bullets before you go. What if something dangerous happens?
1000643894.korean: 총알 보충하고 가, 위험한 일이라도 생기면 어떡해.

1000643895.english: The bullets are exactly the same as before.

1000643897.english: Did you really kill it by hitting it with that coffin?

1000643898.english: They weren't strong enough to warrant firing.

1000643899.english: The coffin... I guess I'll have to have a new one made. It's the one I cherished to use with my master. It's completely ruined.
1000643899.korean: 관은... 새로 짜야겠군요. 주인님과 함께 쓰려고 아끼던 건데. 완전히 망가져버렸어요.

1000643900.english: Death is synonymous with birth. That coffin will be able to be born more powerfully.
1000643900.korean: 사멸은 탄생과 동일한 말이죠. 그 관은 더 강력하게 태어날 수 있을 거예요.

1000643901.english: I will provide a special alloy for the next time you make it.
1000643901.korean: 다음에 만들 땐 제가 특수 합금을 지원해 드릴게요.

1000643903.english: I hadn't thought of that... I'll add it for you. We just need to change the ingredient ratios slightly.
1000643903.korean: 그건 생각 못 해봤는데... 추가해드릴게요. 성분비만 조금 다르게 하면 되니까.

1000643905.english: ...I hate that I'm slowly getting used to you guys.

1000643909.english: ...True to its nature as the final factory, it's swarming with AGSs. Even if I combined all the enemies I've fought so far, there wouldn't be as many as this.
1000643909.korean: ...최후의 공장답게 AGS들이 우글거려. 여태 싸운 적들 다 합쳐도 이것보다 적겠는데.

1000643910.english: Once we take care of that, our work will be done.
1000643910.korean: 저것만 처리하면 저희 할 일은 끝이네요.

1000643911.english: All that remains is to trust and wait for the members of the religious order.
1000643911.korean: 남은 건 교단 분들을 믿고 기다리는 것뿐이군요.

1000643912.english: ...You know what? I'm saying this because this might be the last time.

1000643913.english: The time I spent with you guys was really exhausting and difficult, but...
1000643913.korean: 너희들이랑 함께 다닌 시간이 정말 고되고 힘들었지만...

1000643915.english: Listen to what people say until the end!

1000643916.english: So, what I want to say is...

1000643918.english: Uh, what? Was the one you said you'd make for me earlier that fast?
1000643918.korean: 어, 뭐야? 아까 나한테 만들어 준다던 거 저렇게 빨랐어?

1000643919.english: But why is that going straight for the factory...?

1000643922.english: Babel is protected by an energy field, so even if it's a heavy load, it can easily handle a regular building.
1000643922.korean: 바벨은 에너지장에 보호 받아서 무리여도 일반 건물 정도는 가뿐하죠.

1000643923.english: Now that our work is done, shall we trust the Order and wait, just as Miss Eternity said?
1000643923.korean: 이제 저희 할 일도 끝났으니, 이터니티 양이 말했던 것처럼 교단분들을 믿고 기다려볼까요.

1000643924.english: What is that...? Why is it exploding?

1000643925.english: Did you recommend that I ride something like that?
1000643925.korean: 나한테 저런 걸 타라고 권유했던 거야?

1000643926.english: When did you even add the explosion function!

1000643927.english: The remaining troops are swarming in after hearing the sound.

1000643928.english: It's a relief that we conserved our ammunition. If we just hold out this time, things should get better.
1000643928.korean: 탄약을 아껴서 다행이군요. 이번만 버텨내면 좀 나아지겠죠.

1000643929.english: I hope the angels do a good job.

1000643930.english: Ah, seriously! You absolutely have to explain that when you're done!
1000643930.korean: 아, 진짜! 끝나면 저거 무조건 설명해!

1000643933.english: Establish positions in the surrounding area.

1000643934.english: Those in good health, be on guard, and those with serious injuries, check your equipment. The battle is not over yet.
1000643934.korean: 몸상태가 나쁘지 않은 이들은 사주를 경계하고, 부상이 심한 이들은 장비를 점검하라. 아직 전투는 끝나지 않았다.

1000643936.english: Thank you for your hard work. Thanks to you, the situation has improved.

1000643937.english: You guys worked hard distracting them, too. Now we just need to stop the Iron Bug, right?
1000643937.korean: 너희도 시선 끄느라 고생했어. 이제 철충만 막으면 되지?

1000643938.english: As long as that light doesn't stop, the Iron Bugs will keep swarming in.
1000643938.korean: 저 빛이 멈추지 않는 이상 철충은 계속 몰려들 거예요.

1000643939.english: Death is still close, that hasn't changed.

1000643940.english: It is enough that enemies do not pop up from within the order. Because there are fewer things to worry about.
1000643940.korean: 교단 내부에서 적이 튀어나오지 않는 것만으로도 충분합니다. 신경 쓸 게 줄었으니까요.

1000643943.english: What are the remaining quantities of Type 5 supplies and the condition of the soldiers?

1000643944.english: Less than a quarter of what was brought remains.
1000643944.korean: 가져온 것에 반의 반도 남지 않은 상태입니다.

1000643945.english: Still, since the factory has stopped operating, I expect we can hold out for about two hours.
1000643945.korean: 그래도 공장의 가동이 멈췄으니까 2시간 정도는 버틸 수 있을 거라 예상됩니다.

1000643946.english: Thanks to Azaz's help, I think the ammo will be replenished soon.
1000643946.korean: 아자즈님이 도와주셔서 탄약은 금방 보충될 것 같아요.

1000643947.english: What worries me is the barrel. The rifling is wearing down because it's been fired non-stop.
1000643947.korean: 걱정되는 건 총열이에요. 쉬지 않고 쏘다 보니 강선이 마모되고 있어요.

1000643948.english: You don't need to worry about the effective range. It looks like it will turn into a close-quarters battle anyway.
1000643948.korean: 유효 사정거리는 신경쓰지 않아도 좋다. 어차피 근접전 양상으로 흘러갈 거 같으니까.

1000643949.english: Dig the trenches deep as well. We are short on time, so have the minimum number of personnel maintain the perimeter, and have the remaining half dig the ground.
1000643949.korean: 참호도 깊게 파라. 시간이 부족하니 최소 인원으로 경계를 유지하고 남은 절반은 땅을 파도록.

1000643950.english: Let me know if there is anything that needs to be demolished. I'll help too.
1000643950.korean: 철거할 거 있으면 말해. 나도 도와줄게.

1000643951.english: I feel like my throat is going to give out... but I can still shout more.
1000643951.korean: 목이 나갈 것 같지만... 아직 더 소리칠 수 있어.

1000643952.english: It won't be of much help, though.

1000643953.english: If you don't mind me, I will stop the impending death for you.

1000643955.english: Don't worry about it, that's just how he talks.
1000643955.korean: 신경쓰지 마, 쟤 말투가 원래 그래.

1000643956.english: To think that the mighty Draculina is playing the role of a nanny...

1000643958.english: Don't burn with competitiveness over useless things.

1000643960.english: It would be a great help to the power supply if the three of you could help. Thank you.
1000643960.korean: 세 분이 도와주시면 전력에 큰 도움이 되겠죠. 감사합니다.

1000643962.english: My gun! What are you doing bending the barrel, Lord Azaz!
1000643962.korean: 제 총! 총신을 휘어놓으면 어떻게 하심까, 아자즈님!

1000643963.english: If you design it this way, you can fire even from inside the trench.
1000643963.korean: 이렇게 설계하면 참호 안에서도 사격할 수 있어요.

1000643964.english: Oh, really? That's amazing! Thank you, Azaz.
1000643964.korean: 앗, 진짜임까? 엄청나지 말임다! 감사함다, 아자즈님.

1000643965.english: Hehe, it's nothing. However, you should be careful as there is a certain probability that the barrel might explode.
1000643965.korean: 후후, 뭘요. 대신 일정 확률로 총열이 폭발할 수도 있으니 조심하셔야 해요.

1000643969.english: Even though he looks like that, he does it when he needs to, so you don't have to worry.
1000643969.korean: 저래 보여도 할 땐 하니까 걱정하지 않아도 돼.

1000643970.english: Are you okay? It looks like there isn't a single healthy part of your body.
1000643970.korean: 너는 괜찮아? 몸에 성한 구석이 없는 거 같은데.

1000643971.english: An injury is no different from a soldier's medal of merit. It's fine.
1000643971.korean: 부상은 군인의 무공 훈장이나 다름없죠. 괜찮습니다.

1000643975.english: Ah... thank you. You are skilled at medical treatment.

1000643976.english: Regimental Commander, we have completed the construction of the position.

1000643977.english: Thanks to Azaz's help, it was completed faster than expected. In addition to the fortifications, fixed turrets and anti-aircraft machine guns have also been installed.
1000643977.korean: 아자즈 님의 도움으로 생각보다 빨리 완공됐습니다. 진지 외에도 고정형 터렛 및 대공 기관총 설치 완료됐습니다.

1000643978.english: It hasn't even been 10 minutes... That's amazing.

1000643979.english: Yawn... It wasn't difficult at all.

1000643980.english: It was an easier task than making models as a hobby.

1000643981.english: Would you like me to customize the T-40 tank Mr. Red Hood drives in your spare time? It could become much faster and more powerful than it is now.
1000643981.korean: 남는 시간에 레드후드 씨가 타고 다니는 T-40 전차도 개조해 드릴까요? 지금보다 훨씬 빠르고 강력해질 수 있는데.

1000643982.english: It’s fine. I’m not so shameless as to ask you to even modify my vehicle.
1000643982.korean: 괜찮습니다. 탈것의 개조까지 부탁드릴 정도로 염치없진 않습니다.

1000643983.english: It's nothing. I'm doing it because I like it.

1000643984.english: It will be faster if we install the newly made engine.
1000643984.korean: 이번에 새로 만든 엔진을 장착하면 더 빨라질 거예요.

1000643985.english: Hey, you put an explosive device there again, didn't you? You shouldn't put that there!
1000643985.korean: 야, 너 또 거기다 폭발 장치 달았지? 그거 달면 안돼!

1000643987.english: Regimental Commander, the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) are swarming in.

1000643988.english: The light coming from the barbell has become stronger.

1000643989.english: Could it be like the last flame before it goes out? I don't know if it's us or them, though.
1000643989.korean: 꺼지기 전 마지막 불꽃같은 걸까요? 그게 저희일지, 저쪽일지는 모르겠지만.

1000643991.english: Listen, warriors of the Steel Line!

1000643992.english: Minnows who don't know their place are swarming in.

1000643993.english: Show them exactly why we are Steel Line!

1000643994.english: There are still members who haven't returned.

1000643995.english: I have to go save them!

1000643998.english: ... Thank you for calming me down, Hirume.

1000643999.english: Please give me a situation report.

1000644001.english: So, you can't use your usual power.
